description: Spawned Chase sub-agent but provided only a text handoff message without giving Chase the file paths, identity context, or Chrome session access he needed to actually execute. Chase came back unable to proceed — could not read identity files, could not access Chrome session.
correction: When spawning a sub-agent, the spawn payload must include: (1) absolute file paths to all referenced files, (2) confirmation of what tools/connectors are available in the session, (3) any runtime state (e.g., active Chrome tab URL, account keys) needed to resume mid-task.
systemic_fix: Create a spawn checklist: before Agent tool call, confirm agent has paths to identity files, relevant workflow files, active tool list, and any runtime state. Sub-agents do not inherit session context automatically.
